title: CLARK COLLEGE - 211info
text: CLARK COLLEGE CLARK COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of educational, vocational, college credit, and developmental courses, including adult basic education, high school adult diploma, GED test instruction, continuing education opportunities, and English as a Second Language classes. 1933 Fort Vancouver Way Vancouver, WA 98663 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (360) 699-6398 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 699-6398 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - VETERAN CENTER OF EXCELLENCE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL HYGIENE CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
